name: Last Word

spec.method_detail: Shake with ice. Double strain into chilled coupe.

history: Originated at the Detroit Athletic Club around 1916. It disappeared for decades until Murray Stenson rediscovered it at Zig Zag Café in Seattle around 2004 — the 'Stenson Effect' spread it across the craft cocktail world almost overnight. It's a perfect equal-parts cocktail: four strong, distinct flavors (gin, herbal, sweet-nutty-cherry, citrus) that somehow balance completely.
